'''Haber Trell''' was a [[Merchant/Legends|trader]], who unknowingly got involved in a devious [[Capture of Zekka Thyne|scheme]] devised by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==Biography==
Born on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]], Trell spent most of his adult life wandering between [[Star system/Legends|systems]] taking whatever available jobs he could find.<ref name="ST" />
